violations.description: Scenarios rely on idempotent setup and per-test deterministic neighbor IDs, but do not explicitly tear down created mapping/thread artifacts.
violations.suggestion: Add optional cleanup/reset helper for persistent environments while keeping current deterministic suffixing.

recommendations: Keep deterministic per-test neighbor suffixing as the baseline isolation strategy
Introduce teardown/reset hooks only for long-lived shared environments
summary: Isolation is materially improved by per-test neighbor IDs and helper extraction; only teardown in persistent environments remains a moderate concern.
